episode0.title: THE POD — FINAL DIRECTOR'S CUT V8

event1.text: I'm standing close enough to see frost crawling off the glass.

event2.text: There is a body shape inside. Not a shadow. Not a reflection.

event3.text: I want to move closer. I also want to run until the station runs out of floor.

event4.text: Operator, pick one before I do something stupid with confidence.

event2.text: My boots are sticking to the deck. Condensation froze in patches.

event3.text: If I fall in front of the most important corpse-or-not-corpse in history, delete the footage.

event1.text: I hate it. Which probably means it's the correct call.

event3.text: Channel is cleaner. The pod sounds like someone breathing through a wall.

event0.text: Before anyone touches the chamber: scan first.

event1.text: Cryostasis is not sleep. It is a machine convincing a body not to leave.

event2.text: Wake it wrong and you can save the lungs while losing the person.

event4.text: I said what my fear said before my manners caught up.

event2.title: OCCUPANT MEDICAL SCAN
event2.content:
NAME: NOAH VOSS
STATUS: ALIVE
HEARTBEAT: DETECTED
NEURAL ACTIVITY: LOW BUT PRESENT
CRYOSTASIS STATE: UNSTABLE
WAKE RISK: HIGH
PRESERVATION RISK: RISING
event2.caption: Medical scan recovered from emergency pod system.
event2.message: [OCCUPANT MEDICAL SCAN ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event4.text: I need everyone to understand that I am holding onto that word with both hands.

event1.title: CRYOSTASIS LOCK WARNING
event1.content:
LOCK STATE: ACTIVE
SUBJECT: NOAH VOSS
INSTRUCTION: DO NOT WAKE
REQUESTED BY: ETHAN HALE
OVERRIDE STATUS: AVAILABLE
WARNING: MANUAL OVERRIDE MAY TRIGGER NEURAL SHOCK
event1.caption: Cryostasis warning recovered from pod control layer.
event1.message: [CRYOSTASIS LOCK WARNING ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event2.text: Ethan's name is on the lock.

event5.text: You keep saying that like reasons don't leave bodies behind.

event1.text: Missing file. Eighth slot. Alive in a pod that Hale ordered locked.

event2.text: I don't know whether to laugh, scream, or punch the glass until my hand stops being useful.

event6.text: I locked him because he asked me to.

event8.text: Noah was awake for maybe thirty seconds.

event10.text: Long enough to know he was terrified.

event12.text: He looked at me and said, 'If I start making sense, don't trust me.'

event23.text: No. You let the room say it for you.

event5.text: Scared enough to pretend it's only anger.

event8.text: Noah used to sing during reboots.

event12.text: Like the song owed him money.

event14.text: If that's him in there, I don't get to choose the easier version of grief.

event3.text: Slow wake keeps Noah's brain safer.

event5.text: But the chamber is failing while we wait.

event7.text: Hard wake gets him out fast.

event9.text: But it could break something inside him we can't patch.

event11.text: And the Black Box storage is tied into the wake cycle.

event15.text: Slow wake may corrupt part of the Black Box.

event20.text: So we pick what we can live with.

backgroundEvent6.text: Keep it slow. Let his brain catch the room before the room catches him.

event14.text: But it looked like a person trying to come back.

event16.text: Black Box just lost a chunk.

backgroundEvent8.text: Noah, if you can hear me, I'm sorry.

event21.text: I do not care about clean right now.

event16.text: I was really hoping I was.

event22.text: Fast answers are how this place lies.

event1.text: Don't let him near the black box.

event11.text: That isn't a phrase. Why did I say that?

event15.text: Do not turn him into your report.

event19.text: I remember Hale's hand on the lock.

event21.text: And now I remember waking wrong.

choice0.text: NOAH, WE HAD TO RISK IT.

event6.text: Then do not let him near the black box.

event8.text: You always were dramatic after naps.

event12.text: Or enough of him to be dangerous.

event3.text: Noah. Look at me if you can.

event9.text: Alive is a suspiciously strong word for how I feel.

event1.text: You sound like every person who ever made a bad call and survived long enough to name it necessity.

event7.text: So I will be angry later.

event9.text: Right now I need the black box.

event6.text: It heard the command that started Alpha.

event8.text: Before the station learned how to clean the lie.

event16.text: Of course it is under the thing trying to kill us.

background1.text: Back out if it moves again.

event2.text: Got it. Also lost a glove seam. If I start leaking atmosphere, complain loudly.

background1.text: Noah, can you see the cradle from inside?

background2.text: I can see frost. I can see my hands. I would rather see neither.

event2.text: Arm has it. Slow, but clean. For once, a machine behaved like it had parents.

event0.title: BLACK BOX RECORDER
event0.content:
RECOVERY STATUS: PARTIAL
DECRYPTION MODULE REQUIRED
LINKED SUBJECT: NOAH VOSS
LINKED EVENT: INCIDENT ALPHA
WARNING: access may expose suppressed command audio.
INDEX ANOMALY: crew count mismatch detected.
RECOVERED FRAGMENT: '...not eight... nine...'
event0.caption: Recovered black box recorder connected to Incident Alpha. Crew count mismatch detected.
event0.message: [BLACK BOX RECORDER ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event2.text: NOAH WAS NOT THE MISSING ONE
